1.name: Shield Throw
1.desc: Hurl your shield forward, damaging enemies in its path.
1.upgA: Path A: Shield bursts on hit, dealing AoE damage.
1.upgB: Path B: Shield pierces and returns to you. Catching it grants a shield.

2.name: Iron Bulwark
2.desc: Gain a temporary protective shield and damage nearby enemies.
2.upgA: Path A: Shield burst radius increased and reflects damage.
2.upgB: Path B: Gain massive movement speed and Frenzy stacks.

3.name: Dragon Leap
3.desc: Leap to the target location, cracking the earth and damaging enemies.
3.upgA: Path A: Impact leaves a delayed secondary explosion crater.
3.upgB: Path B: Launch shrapnel in 4 directions upon landing.

4.name: Dragon Breath
4.desc: Unleash a massive cone of fire that burns everything in front of you.
4.upgA: Path A: Fire turns blue, deep-freezing enemies for 3 seconds.
4.upgB: Path B: Fire melts enemy armor, instantly breaking shields.

1.name: Fireball
1.desc: Launch a high-damage fireball. Grants Arcane Resonance.
1.upgA: Path A: Fireball travels significantly faster.
1.upgB: Path B: Fireball leaves a burning puddle on impact.

2.name: Frost Nova
2.desc: Release an expanding wave of ice spikes, freezing enemies. Grants Resonance.
2.upgA: Path A: Enemies are permanently rooted for 3 seconds.
2.upgB: Path B: Gain a temporary health shield upon casting.

3.name: Arcane Blink
3.desc: Teleport a short distance. Grants Arcane Resonance.
3.upgA: Path A: Automatically fire a homing missile at the nearest enemy.
3.upgB: Path B: Leave a small Frost Nova at your original location.

4.name: Meteor Strike
4.desc: Call down a massive, rotating meteor to crush the target area.
4.upgA: Path A: Meteor drop delay reduced to 0.75 seconds.
4.upgB: Path B: Drops a secondary, smaller meteor shortly after.

1.name: Ricochet Arrow
1.desc: Fire a glowing arrow that bounces between multiple enemies.
1.upgA: Path A: Increases max bounces from 3 to 5.
1.upgB: Path B: Bouncing arrows apply a bleeding DoT to targets.

2.name: Zephyr's Grace
2.desc: Call upon the wind to heal yourself and gain a movement speed boost.
2.upgA: Path A: Doubles the healing amount.
2.upgB: Path B: Doubles the movement speed boost duration.

3.name: Wind Dash
3.desc: Swiftly dash in the direction of the cursor.
3.upgA: Path A: Fires a powerful arrow at the nearest enemy during dash.
3.upgB: Path B: Increases dash distance significantly.

4.name: Storm Volley
4.desc: Fire a wide fan of multiple arrows in the target direction.
4.upgA: Path A: All arrows in the volley pierce through enemies.
4.upgB: Path B: Doubles the number of arrows fired.

1.name: Fan of Knives
1.desc: Throw a spread of throwing knives in a frontal cone.
1.upgA: Path A: Knives pierce through all enemies.
1.upgB: Path B: Knives act as boomerangs and return to you, dealing damage twice.

2.name: Smoke Bomb
2.desc: Drop a smoke bomb. While inside, enemies lose tracking of you.
2.upgA: Path A: The smoke is laced with poison, damaging enemies inside.
2.upgB: Path B: Greatly increases radius and cleanses slows/roots.

3.name: Phantom Dash
3.desc: Dash through the shadows, damaging all enemies passed through.
3.upgA: Path A: Doubles the dash distance.
3.upgB: Path B: Grants a second charge to dash again within 2 seconds.

4.name: Death Mark
4.desc: Mark all nearby enemies. After a delay, shadows strike them for massive damage.
4.upgA: Path A: Heals you for 5% max HP for every enemy successfully struck.
4.upgB: Path B: The ultimate damage multiplier is increased.

1.name: Deploy Turret
1.desc: Deploy an automated turret that shoots at the nearest enemy.
1.upgA: Path A: Turret fires a continuous piercing laser beam instead of bullets.
1.upgB: Path B: Turret becomes Volatile, exploding when destroyed or expired.

2.name: Tesla Coil Trap
2.desc: Throw a trap that periodically shocks and slows enemies in its radius.
2.upgA: Path A: The shock now fully roots enemies in place.
2.upgB: Path B: Creates a deadly lightning tether to any nearby Turrets.

3.name: Magnetic Grapple
3.desc: Grapple to a deployed Turret or Tesla Coil. Fails if no target is near the cursor.
3.upgA: Path A: Gain a 100 HP shield upon successful grapple.
3.upgB: Path B: Leave a holographic decoy at your starting location.

4.name: System Overclock
4.desc: Refresh all machine durations and massively increase your fire rate.
4.upgA: Path A: At the end of Overclock, all active machines violently detonate.
4.upgB: Path B: Activating Overclock instantly spawns two extra temporary turrets.

1.name: Parry Thrust / Blade Surge
1.desc: [Handheld] Enter a parry stance. [Airborne] Command the blade to shred a target.
1.upgA: Path A: Handheld Parries grant powerful counter-attacks and Flow.
1.upgB: Path B: Airborne Blade Surge chains up to 3 targets.

2.name: Stance: Deploy / Recall
2.desc: Toggle the Phantom Blade between Handheld (Melee) and Airborne (AI Control) stances.
2.upgA: Path A: Recalling the blade grants 0.5s of invulnerability.
2.upgB: Path B: Deploying the blade instantly generates 30% Flow.

3.name: Shadow Step / Spatial Swap
3.desc: [Handheld] Dash forward. [Airborne] Swap positions with the Phantom Blade.
3.upgA: Path A: Shadow Step leaves behind a phantom that blocks projectiles.
3.upgB: Path B: Spatial Swapping resets the cooldown of Blade Surge.

4.name: Whirlwind / Shatter Storm
4.desc: [Handheld] Spin, dealing heavy AoE damage. [Airborne] The blade shatters into a storm of seeking knives.
4.upgA: Path A: Whirlwind aggressively pulls enemies toward you.
4.upgB: Path B: Shatter Storm knives pierce through multiple enemies.
